description: SOS response regulatory network from RegulonDB (v13): LexA repressor, RecA co-protease, and individual LexA-regulated genes (recA, lexA, uvrA-D, recN, sulA, umuDC, dinB, dinI, polB, ruvA/B, ssb). Full regulon wiring.
name: SOS Response (RegulonDB-sourced)
notes: V3 = RegulonDB only. LexA represses 15+ SOS genes; RecA stimulates LexA cleavage; derepression activates repair, mutagenesis, and cell-division genes.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DNA[DNA damage]
    RECA[RecA]
    LEXA[LexA]
    DNA -->|ssDNA| RECA
    RECA -->|stimulates cleavage| LEXA
    LEXA -->|represses| RECA_G[recA]
    LEXA -->|represses| LEXA_G[lexA]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRA[uvrA]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRB[uvrB]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRC[uvrC]
    LEXA -->|represses| UVRD[uvrD]
    LEXA -->|represses| RECN[recN]
    LEXA -->|represses| SULA[sulA]
    LEXA -->|represses| UMUDC[umuDC]
    LEXA -->|represses| DINB[dinB]
    LEXA -->|represses| DINI[dinI]
    LEXA -->|represses| POLB[polB]
    LEXA -->|represses| RUVA[ruvA]
    LEXA -->|represses| RUVB[ruvB]
    LEXA -->|represses| SSB[ssb]
    RECA_G -->|feedback| RECA
    style DNA fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style RECA fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style LEXA fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style RECA_G fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style LEXA_G fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UVRD fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RECN fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style SULA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style UMUDC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style DINB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style DINI fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style POLB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RUVA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RUVB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style SSB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: Diagram derived from RegulonDB (v13) SOS regulon; LexA–RecA and LexA–gene edges for representative SOS genes (NER, recombination, mutagenesis, cell division).

sources.title: RegulonDB
sources.note: E. coli LexA regulon; regulator–gene edges for SOS genes.
